seoBlock.title: 面向创作者的 AI 音乐生成器
seoBlock.p1: Calyra AI 是 AI song generator 和 AI music generator，帮助创作者把提示词、歌词和歌曲想法变成完整曲目。你可以描述想要的声音、选择风格，并生成带人声和乐器的音乐。
seoBlock.p2: 常见用途包括 AI rap、anime opening、phonk、lo-fi 背景音乐、EDM drop、情绪钢琴 ballad 和社交内容 pop 歌曲。创作者可为 YouTube、TikTok、Shorts、播客、游戏、广告和个人项目制作 AI 歌曲。

faq.title: 生成前的常见问题
faq.a1: AI song generator 可以根据提示词、歌词、情绪和风格描述创建歌曲。Calyra AI 帮你无需传统制作技能也能生成带人声和乐器的音乐。
faq.q2: 如何用 AI 做一首歌？
faq.a2: 输入描述类型、情绪、故事、歌词、人声风格和用途的提示词，也可以从模板或示例歌曲开始。
faq.q3: 可以把歌词变成歌曲吗？
faq.a3: 可以。粘贴歌词并描述编曲、速度、情绪和人声方向，Calyra AI 可以帮助把歌词变成带人声和乐器的歌曲方向。
faq.q4: Calyra AI 是免费的 AI song maker 吗？
faq.a4: 你可以免费开始测试歌曲想法。更多生成次数、月度歌曲额度、下载和商用权可通过付费计划或一次性点数包获得。
faq.q5: AI 生成歌曲可以商用吗？
faq.a5: 订阅用户可以下载生成歌曲，并在最新条款约束下用于内容、商业项目和音乐发行。
faq.q6: 可以生成带人声的歌曲吗？
faq.a6: 可以。Calyra AI 面向完整歌曲生成，具体结果取决于提示词和生成模式。
faq.q7: 可以为 YouTube 或 TikTok 创作音乐吗？
faq.a7: 可以。你可以为 YouTube、TikTok、Shorts、播客和社交媒体生成 hook、背景音乐、片头、主题曲和完整歌曲。

faq.title: 常见问题
faq.q1: 生成歌曲要多少积分？划算吗？
faq.a1: 每次生成消耗 200 积分，可一次获得 2 首歌曲。也就是说，平均 100 积分/首，能快速做对比、选最佳版本，创作效率更高。
faq.q2: 付款安全吗？我担心支付风险
faq.a2: 完全可以放心。我们使用主流支付通道，采用银行级加密与风控体系。支付信息由支付平台安全处理，我们无法看到或保存你的完整支付数据。
faq.q3: 订阅怎么收费？会不会忘记续费？
faq.a3: 我们有 Basic / Pro 两档，支持月付和年付。月付每月自动续费，年付每年自动续费。首次扣费从开通当天开始，你可以按创作频率灵活选择方案。
faq.q4: 订阅后我能拿到哪些版权权益？
faq.a4: 订阅用户可下载全部已生成歌曲，并获得完整商业使用授权，可用于内容发布、商业项目和音乐平台分发。
faq.q5: 免费用户每天能生成几次？
faq.a5: 每 24 小时提供 1–2 次免费生成，可产出 2–4 首歌曲。采用滚动计时：你何时用完，就从该时刻起计算下一次恢复时间。
faq.q6: 作品会保存多久？会不会被删掉？
faq.a6: 当前规则是：免费用户歌曲保存 30 天；Basic / Pro 订阅用户在订阅期间生成的歌曲为长期保存。如果你有长期运营内容或曲库沉淀需求，建议选择更高档位。

pricingPage.subscribeNowCancelAnytime: 立即订阅 - 可随时取消。

common.contactBody: For questions about these policies or your account, contact support at support@calyraai.com or through your dashboard support channel.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | Calyra AI
seo.description: How Calyra AI collects, uses, and protects personal data for account, payment, and AI song creation workflows.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This policy explains what data Calyra AI handles, why we handle it, and the choices you have.

sections.title: Data we collect
body: We collect account identifiers such as email and authentication data, song creation inputs such as stories and prompts, generation outputs such as lyrics and audio metadata, and billing records needed to process purchases.
bullets: Account data: email, auth provider identifiers, profile basics
Creation data: story text, style selections, generated lyrics/audio references
Usage data: logs, device/browser metadata, anti-abuse signals
Billing data: transaction references from payment processors

sections.title: How we use data
body: We use data to operate core product flows, deliver purchased services, prevent abuse, improve reliability, and communicate important account or policy updates.
bullets: Run lyric, audio, and report generation workflows
Store and serve your songs and public share pages
Process credits, subscriptions, and refunds
Investigate incidents and maintain security

sections.title: Third-party services
body: Calyra AI relies on selected infrastructure and model providers to deliver the service. These providers process only the data required for their function under applicable agreements.
bullets: Hosting and database services
Payment processing services
Email and notification services
AI generation providers for lyrics, audio, and analysis

sections.title: Retention and your choices
body: We retain data for as long as needed to provide the service, meet legal obligations, and resolve disputes. You can request deletion of your account data subject to operational and legal constraints.
bullets: You may delete songs and account data from product surfaces where available
Backups and legal records may persist for limited periods
Public song pages remain public until you change visibility or remove them

seo.title: Terms of Service | Calyra AI
seo.description: Terms governing use of Calyra AI, including account responsibilities, generated content, credits, subscriptions, and limitations.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: By using Calyra AI, you agree to these terms for account access, AI generation, and paid features.

sections.title: Service scope
body: Calyra AI provides tools to transform user prompts into lyrics, audio, and creator-style reports. Features can change over time and may vary by plan or region.

sections.title: Accounts and acceptable use
body: You are responsible for activity under your account and for complying with law and platform policies.
bullets: Do not misuse the service, attempt unauthorized access, or automate abuse
Do not upload unlawful, infringing, or harmful content
Keep account credentials secure and accurate

sections.title: Content and intellectual property
body: You retain rights to the inputs you submit. Subject to applicable law and these terms, you may use outputs generated for your account. Calyra AI and its licensors retain rights in the platform, models, and infrastructure.

sections.title: Payments, credits, and refunds
body: Paid features include credit packs and subscriptions. Charges are processed by our payment providers. Refund eligibility is governed by our Refund Policy.
bullets: Credits are consumed by eligible generation actions
Subscription access and benefits follow the active billing period
Refund requests are reviewed under stated policy conditions

sections.title: Disclaimers and limitation
body: The service is provided on an as-available basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation or specific creative outcomes. To the maximum extent permitted by law, liability is limited to amounts paid for the relevant service period.

seo.title: Refund Policy | Calyra AI
seo.description: Refund eligibility, timelines, and process for Calyra AI credit purchases and subscriptions.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: This policy explains when refunds are available and how to request one.

sections.title: Eligibility
body: Refunds are available for unused credits requested within 7 days of purchase.
bullets: Request must be submitted within 7 calendar days
Credits tied to the request must be unused
The purchase must be made through an official Calyra AI checkout flow

sections.title: Non-refundable cases
body: Refunds are generally not available for credits that have been used, expired windows, or abuse-related account restrictions.
bullets: Partially or fully consumed credits
Requests beyond the 7-day window
Fraud, chargeback abuse, or policy violations

sections.title: How to request a refund
body: Contact support with your account email, order identifier, and reason for the request. We may ask for additional verification to protect account security.
bullets: Include order ID and purchase date
Use the same account email used for purchase
Allow support time to verify credit usage status

sections.title: Processing timeline
body: Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method. Processing time depends on your payment provider and card network.
bullets: Policy review: typically within 3 business days
Payment reversal: usually 5-10 business days after approval
